resolvio-ens.name: Resolvio ENS Resolution
resolvio-ens.description: Resolve ENS names to cryptocurrency addresses, text records (avatar, email, description, socials), and content hashes (IPFS, IPNS, Arweave). Reverse-resolve Ethereum addresses to their primary ENS name. Supports bulk resolution for multiple names or addresses in a single call. No API key required.
